message:
fix(ci): add sibling dependency cloning to all CI workflows for local path resolution

After switching frankensqlite, franken-agent-detection, and frankensearch
from pinned git-rev dependencies to local path references (../frankensqlite,
../franken_agent_detection, ../frankensearch), CI runners that check out only
the cass repo fail during cargo resolve because the sibling directories
don't exist in the GitHub Actions workspace.

- Add a "Clone sibling dependencies" step to every workflow job that runs
  cargo: ci.yml (check, test, clippy, fmt, msrv, doc), bench.yml,
  browser-tests.yml, coverage.yml, fuzz.yml, install-test.yml,
  lighthouse.yml, perf.yml
- Each step shallow-clones (--depth 1) the four sibling repos (asupersync,
  frankensqlite, franken_agent_detection, frankensearch) into the parent
  directory of the checkout, matching the local path layout used on the
  development VPS
- Uses the same actions/checkout pinned SHA across all workflows for
  consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0  # For comparing with main
 
+      - name: Clone sibling dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken_agent_detection.git ../franken_agent_detection
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git ../frankensearch
+
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@881ba7bf39a41cda34ac9e123fb41b44ed08232f # nightly
